rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JACALYN PITCHER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required on the sole issue of whether this petition should be taken off calendar for lack of progress. The petition has been pending without satisfactory progress for more than a year, after 8 continuances including 3 appearances. Updated notes were e-mailed to the petitioner on 11/29/2021. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Rulings: continued to 2/2/22. there is no POS of the NOH on the consulate for Malta, and the declaration filed was signed and verified by the attorney, not by the petitioner as instructed in the examiner notes. the exception that allows an attorney to sign and verify on behalf of a client does not apply when the client is seeking to be appoointed as a fiduciary in the proceedin (CRC 7.103(c)). please note, examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10. filing deadline is noon on 2/2/22.

Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JAMES B. LEATHERMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 01/24/2022. 1) David A. Leatherman, the relationship to Decedent, the age, and address is not listed on page 4 under #8. 2) Please have Robert Leatherman file a declination to serve and/or nomination of David A. Leatherman as Robert Leatherman appears to have priorirty for appointment. 3) Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 1/18/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
